name: LegalForensics
description:
AI that tells you whether a contract is safe to sign — and what to renegotiate if it isn't.

Review contracts directly inside Claude — no separate software, no dashboards, no files uploaded to external apps.

Designed for founders, operators, and small teams who sign vendor agreements, customer contracts, NDAs, and employment deals without in-house legal support. If you're signing the other party's paper and making the call yourself, this tool is for you.

--- WHAT YOU CAN ASK ---

• "What are the biggest risks in this contract?"
• "Is this safe for me to sign?"
• "What should I push back on?"
• "Explain this contract in plain English."
• "Explain this clause — what does it actually mean?"
• "Should I sign, negotiate, or walk away?"

Works on any business contract: NDAs, MSAs, SOWs, employment, lease, consulting, service, distribution, franchise, partnership, and foundry/semiconductor agreements.

--- HOW TO USE ---

1. UPLOAD YOUR CONTRACT
   Share a Google Doc link or paste the contract text.
   You'll get back a contract_id. Each upload costs 1 credit.

2. GET YOUR ANALYSIS
   Ask any of the questions above. Behind the scenes:
   - get_risk_analysis answers "What are the risks?" and "What should I push back on?"
   - get_verdict answers "Should I sign, negotiate, or walk away?"
   - explain_contract answers "Explain this contract in plain English"

   Add your role (e.g. buyer, seller, employer, disclosing party) to frame results from your side of the deal.

3. ANALYZE A SPECIFIC CLAUSE (no upload needed)
   Paste any clause text directly. Free — no credit required.

--- CREDITS & PLANS ---

- Each contract upload costs 1 credit
- Clause analysis is free (no credit required)
- New accounts receive 1 free credit on signup
- Additional credits: use check_credits to get a purchase link, or visit legalforensics.ai
- Subscription plan (unlimited uploads + additional tools including playbook review): contact us at legalforensics.ai

--- PERSPECTIVES ---

All analysis tools accept an optional perspective to frame results from your role in the contract. Common roles: buyer, seller, employer, employee, landlord, tenant, licensor, licensee, disclosing party, receiving party, foundry, fabless, lender, borrower, and more.

User Agreement: https://app.legalforensics.ai/assets/docs/user-agreement.pdf
Learn more at legalforensics.ai
author: LegalForensics.AI

auth.instructions: Sign up at app.legalforensics.ai/plugin — your API key will be shown immediately after signup. Paste it here to connect. You will receive 1 free credit to get started.

tools.name: upload_contract
tools.description: Upload a contract via Google Doc share link or pasted text. Returns a contract_id for analysis. Costs 1 credit per upload.

tools.name: get_risk_analysis
tools.description: Answers: 'What are the biggest risks?' and 'What should I push back on?' Returns risk posture, top risks ranked by severity, exposure drivers, favorable terms, structural assessment, and next steps. Supports perspective framing (buyer, seller, employer, disclosing party, etc.).

tools.name: get_verdict
tools.description: Answers: 'Should I sign, negotiate, or walk away?' Returns a clear verdict with reasoning, priority renegotiation asks, and top 3 actions. Supports perspective framing.

tools.name: explain_contract
tools.description: Answers: 'Explain this contract in plain English.' Returns a narrative walkthrough — what it does, who holds the risk, and what a non-lawyer needs to know before signing.

tools.name: explain_clause
tools.description: Answers: 'What does this clause mean?' Paste any clause text for plain-English explanation and risk assessment. No contract upload needed. Free — no credit required.

tools.name: list_contracts
tools.description: List all contracts in your LegalForensics account, optionally filtered by keyword.

tools.name: check_credits
tools.description: Check your credit balance. Returns credits remaining, credits used, and a purchase link if balance is zero.
